name: Spanish
tagline: Learn the Spanish you actually need - for where you are going.

chapters.title: Visiting Spain
chapters.summary: Survive and connect on a trip - greetings, numbers, eating out, getting around and shopping.

chapters.title: Meeting People
chapters.summary: Make it social - introduce yourself, say what you like and do, and keep a conversation going.

chapters.title: Visiting Spain II
chapters.summary: Level up old tourist situations into real two-way conversations where you ask, negotiate, and decide.

chapters.title: Unlock Spanish
chapters.summary: Stop reciting, start creating - combine the words you already know into your own sentences.

chapters.title: Everyday Life
chapters.summary: Talk about your routine, habits, home and free time - and hold a basic conversation about daily life.

chapters.title: Real conversations
chapters.summary: Move from surviving situations into real social life, then handle everyday conversations naturally.
